flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Florida National University-Main Campus rose 27% between 2021 and 2024 ($13.7k → $17.4k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Florida National University-Main Campus rose 27% between 2021 and 2024 ($13.7k → $17.4k).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Florida National University-Main Campus fell 26% between 2021 and 2024 (42.4% → 31.2%).

flags.label: 100%-time completion
flags.summary: 100%-time completion at Florida National University-Main Campus fell 25% between 2021 and 2024 (47.7% → 35.8%).
